{{Quote|He led the Rebel commandos in the assault on the Imperial bunker on Endor, was an important part of the Echo Base command structure on Hoth, and was responsible for saving countless civilian lives at the Battle of Nentan.|Voren Na'al, about Bren Derlin|<ref name="TLCS">''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
'''Nentan''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Nentan system/Legends|Nentan system]] of the [[Glythe sector/Legends|Glythe sector]]. Nentan was a barren planet, and the main point of interest was the [[Ancient ruins (Nentan)|ancient ruins]] of a [[City/Legends|city]] built by an unknown [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Unidentified species (Nentan)|species]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Nentan briefly hosted an [[Nentan checkpoint base|Alliance base]]. The facility was [[Battle of Nentan|evacuated]] after being discovered two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after going operational. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin's]] actions during the evacuation earned him a promotion to the rank of [[Major/Legends|Major]].

==Description==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Nentan was located in the [[Nentan system/Legends|Nentan system]], part of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Glythe sector/Legends|Glythe sector]]. The world was a barren, terrestrial wasteland.<ref name="SWR" /> Nentan was located on the [[Celanon Spur/Legends|Celanon Spur]],<ref name="TEA" /> and was the endpoint for a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connecting Nentan to [[Valrar]].<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==History==
At some point in the planet's history, an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Unidentified species (Nentan)|species]] built a [[City/Legends|city]] on Nentan. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the city was nothing more than [[Ancient ruins (Nentan)|ancient ruins]] and nothing was known about the original builders.<ref name="SWR" /> During the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] expansion of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]], the government tried to set up Nentan, alongside [[Cassander]] and [[Ketaris/Legends|Ketaris]], as trading rivals to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. The efforts failed, and only served to push Ord Mantell to higher prominence.<ref name="TEA" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] actively suppressed Rebel activity on Nentan. Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] participated in a relief mission to the planet.<ref name="TEA" />

Following the Battle of Yavin, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] established a [[Nentan checkpoint base|base]] on Nentan. It served as a major stopover point for civilians being transported on to Alliance [[Safe world/Legends|safe worlds]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] commanded the base, with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]] serving under him. Two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the base went operational, it was discovered by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. An evacuation was ordered, but the checkpoint base was full of civilians. Evacuation priority was to be given to the civilians, but there were not enough [[Transport/Legends|transports]] available to handle both the civilians and Alliance military personnel.<ref name="GG3" />

[[File:Brenderlin.jpg|thumb|left|Bren Derlin, the Hero of Nentan]]
Faced with the prospect of abandoning military forces on Nentan, Captain Derlin presented General Rieekan with a solution. While the civilians were evacuated, Captain Derlin led a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of "expendable" personnel into the [[Nentan wastes]], hiding among the rocky spires of the ancient ruins.<ref name="GG3" />

Imperial forces assaulted the abandoned base with their full might, leaving their own transports under light guard. Captain Derlin led his men through the natural cover around the landing zone, and managed to capture<ref name="GG3" /> an Imperial [[Landing barge/Legends|landing barge]].<ref name="Databank-Derlin">{{DB|character|majorbrenderlin|Derlin, Major Bren}}</ref> The surprise move outwitted the Imperials as the transport left Nentan. Even the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of the [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] believed the transport to still be under their control, either moving prisoners or captured equipment. The transport jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] before a code clearance could be asked for. For his actions, Captain Derlin was promoted to the rank of [[Major/Legends|Major]].<ref name="GG3" />

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Nentan was captured and occupied by the extragalactic aliens.<ref name="TEA" />

==Inhabitants==
Nentan was an inhabited planet. During the Galactic Civil War, the population was actively oppressed by the Empire.<ref name="TEA" /> [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]] [[Bron Burs]] hailed from Nentan, specifically the southern region.<ref name="CCG-Bron">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Bron Burs}}</ref>

==Locations==
Nentan's most notable location was the ancient ruins of a city built by an unknown alien species.<ref name="SWR" /> Located in the Nentan wastes, it was comprised of towering rock spires.<ref name="GG3" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
